refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable achieving the customer-defined productivity target by optimizing equipment operation and task execution efficiency.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and outcome-focused; refining it into sub-FRs clarifies specific functional aspects that contribute to productivity, enabling targeted design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure actual productivity (m³/h or ton/h) during representative operations and compare against the customer-defined target; verify sub-FRs by assessing equipment operation efficiency and task execution metrics.
sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operational parameters to maximize throughput.
FR2: Efficiently schedule and execute worksite tasks to minimize idle time.
FR3: Provide real-time productivity feedback to operators and tele-operators.

candidate_dps: DP1: Adaptive equipment control algorithms to optimize operational parameters.
DP2: Task management system for dynamic scheduling and execution.
DP3: Real-time telemetry and feedback interface for productivity monitoring.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Adaptive equipment control algorithms to optimize operational parameters.

potential_sources: Interaction between control algorithms and task management system.
Dependency on telemetry data for feedback.
coupling_check.notes: DP1 is logically separable but requires well-defined interfaces with DP2 and DP3 to avoid tight coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate sensor data for control algorithms.
Risk of suboptimal performance if task scheduling is not well integrated.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing task management and feedback separately to reduce coupling and improve scalability.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical control and operation of heavy equipment including embedded control systems.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Sends operational data and productivity metrics to external modules.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives scheduled tasks and commands from task management systems.

module_containment_scores.notes: Broad scope; contains multiple functions but less focused on control algorithms.
High containment of control logic; low diffusion as control algorithms are centralized here.
Limited containment; mainly remote control and monitoring.
Not relevant for productivity control algorithms.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Control algorithms for optimizing equipment operation are best contained within the Vehicle module to minimize diffusion and ensure tight integration with embedded systems.
containment_risks: Potential interface complexity with Teleoperation and NGHE Solution modules.
Risk of overloading Vehicle module with non-control responsibilities.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear interface contracts and consider offloading non-control functions to other modules to maintain Vehicle module focus.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP (adaptive control algorithms) directly addresses the refined FR of optimizing equipment operation to achieve productivity targets.

diffusion_risks: Possible diffusion if control logic is partially implemented outside Vehicle module.
Interface complexity with Tasking and Telemetry may increase coupling.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module shows strong containment for control algorithms, minimizing diffusion risk if interfaces are well managed.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by measuring productivity metrics and validating control algorithm performance within the Vehicle module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of control logic to Vehicle module aligns well with functional requirements.

recommended_revisions: Clarify interface definitions between Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.
Review scope of Vehicle module to avoid functional overload.
Plan integration testing to verify interface and containment assumptions.

decision.justification: While the decomposition and assignments are generally sound, interface definitions and module scope require refinement to reduce coupling and diffusion risks before proceeding.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operational parameters to maximize throughput.
FR2: Efficiently schedule and execute worksite tasks to minimize idle time.
FR3: Provide real-time productivity feedback to operators and tele-operators.

revise.why: To refine interface definitions and module scope to reduce diffusion and coupling risks.

assumptions: Accurate sensor data is available for control algorithms.
Task scheduling and telemetry systems will provide timely and reliable data.
open_risks: Interface complexity between Vehicle and other modules.
Potential overloading of Vehicle module responsibilities.
evidence_needed: Interface specifications and data flow diagrams.
